data.title: Phantom Wallet's January revenue exceeded $29 million, a record high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: DeFiLlama data shows that Phantom Wallet's in-app exchange fees exceeded US$29 million in January, setting a record high for monthly revenue.

data.title: Michael Saylor Teases “Big Strategy Day,” Crypto Community Reacts
data.description:
Michael Saylor’s cryptic social media post has ignited speculation following MicroStrategy’s pause in Bitcoin acquisitions. With potential shifts in corporate strategy and regulatory engagement, investors are closely watching his next move.
The post Michael Saylor Teases “Big Strategy Day,” Crypto Community Reacts appeared first on Cryptonews.

data.description:
Asset management titan BlackRock is reportedly going to list a new spot market Bitcoin (BTC) exchange-traded product (ETP) in Europe, its first digital asset-related venture into the continent. data.title: Musk supports putting US Treasury transactions on-chain
data.description: According to Watcher.Guru on the X platform, Musk supports putting U.S. Treasury transactions on the blockchain for full transparency.

data.title: Elon Musk Advocates For Blockchain Transparency In U.S. Treasury Transactions
data.description: According to Odaily, Elon Musk has expressed support for placing U.S. Treasury transactions on the blockchain to achieve complete transparency. This statement was shared by Watcher.Guru on the X platform, highlighting Musk's advocacy for leveraging blockchain technology to enhance financial transparency.

data.title: Strategy reports GAAP loss per share of $3.03 in Q4 2024
data.description: Bitcoin Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) reported a net loss of $3.03 per share in the fourth quarter of 2024, compared with earnings of $0.50 per share in the same period last year. The loss was caused by the company's impairment charge on its Bitcoin holdings. As of December 31, 2024, the Bitcoin holdings were 447,470, while the market expected 425,149. The company recently ended a series of Bitcoin purchases and currently holds 471,107 Bitcoins, worth about $45 billion. The U.S. Financial Stability Accounting Board (FASB) implemented a new fair value accounting rule for companies holding digital assets last year. The use of the rule is voluntary before the end of 2024, but it will be mandatory starting in the first quarter of this year.

data.title: Strategy announces 2025 annual “BTC revenue” target of $10 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitcoin finance company Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) announced a 2025 "BTC revenue" target of $10 billion, and revised the 2025 BTC annual yield target to at least 15%. The company's "BTC yield" KPI reached 74.3% in fiscal 2024 and 2.9% in the first quarter of 2025. Phong Le, president and CEO of the company, said: "We have completed $20 billion of our $42 billion capital plan, significantly ahead of our original schedule, while leading the digital transformation of financial market capital. Looking ahead to the remainder of 2025, we are ready to further enhance shareholder value by leveraging the strong support of institutional and retail investors for our strategic plans."

data.title: Strategy Reports Q4 Loss Due To Bitcoin Impairment
data.description: According to Odaily, Strategy, formerly known as MicroStrategy, reported a net loss of $3.03 per share for the fourth quarter of 2024, contrasting with earnings of $0.50 per share in the same period the previous year. The loss was attributed to impairment charges on the company's Bitcoin holdings. As of December 31, 2024, Strategy held 447,470 Bitcoins, surpassing market expectations of 425,149. Recently, the company completed a series of Bitcoin purchases, bringing its total holdings to 471,107 Bitcoins, valued at approximately $45 billion. The Financial Accounting Standards Board (FASB) in the United States introduced a new fair value accounting rule for companies holding digital assets last year. While its application was voluntary until the end of 2024, it became mandatory starting the first quarter of this year.
